description: Tax receipt issued to Abū l-Ḥasan b. Wahb for his ḍamān on dyeing in Madīnat al-Fayyūm. Dated: Middle of Dhū l-Qaʿda 403. Measurements: 13 × 8 cm. Verso is blank. Written by the jahbadh Mīkhāʾīl b. ʿAbd al-Masīḥ. Amount: one-half plus one-quarter dīnār (Khan read two, one-half, one-quarter and one-sixth).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
